name: Ice Cream, Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice 2 peaches.
2. Mash 1 banana.
3. Mix 4 cups pineapple with juice.
4. Add 8 oz orange juice.
5. Crush 2 cups strawberries.
6. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl or blender until smooth.
7. Transfer mixture to a freezer-safe container and refrigerate until firm, about 4 hours.
8. Once set, remove from the refrigerator and break up into chunks.
9. Whisk the mixture until creamy and serve.
Calories: 75 cal
Exchanges: 1/2 milk and 1/2 fruit
